hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900 leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-gray-900 leading-snug
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.05em] uppercase text-gray-500

surfaces.card_default: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surfaces.card_interactive: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:border-red-600 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer
surfaces.glass_header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.input_field: bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-600/20 focus:border-red-600 transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-[#E40000] text-white hover:bg-[#B30000] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-600/50 focus:ring-offset-2 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-200 focus:ring-offset-2 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-transparent rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-gray-100 text-gray-800
badges.success: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-100 text-green-800
badges.brand: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-red-100 text-red-800

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, professional look. Consistent sizing (w-4 h-4 for inline, w-5 h-5 for buttons/menus).

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the High-Contrast Light theme strictly. The dominant colors should be White and Stark Gray, with Airtel Red (#E40000) used purely for primary actions, progress indicators, and active states.
Do NOT use 'Inter' or generic sans-serif fonts for headings. Use 'Outfit' for all Headings (H1-H4) and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Apply 'tracking-tight' to headings.
The layout must utilize dense 'Control Room' grids. Dashboard metrics and week cards should be neatly aligned with 1px borders and very subtle shadows, avoiding bulky, soft UI elements.
Incorporate the Shadcn UI components for complex interactivity: Dialogs for Add/Edit tasks, Progress for task completion tracking, Calendar/Popover for Due Dates, and Dropdown Menus for task actions.

Every key interactive element, input, and button MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='add-task-button', data-testid='week-1-progress').
Ensure hover, active, and focus states are clearly defined for accessibility. Focus rings should use the brand red color with slight opacity (focus:ring-red-600/50).
Implement auto-save seamlessly. Show a small 'Saving...' or 'All changes saved' indicator in the UI to give users feedback without disrupting their flow.

For the 8-Week display, use an Accordion or expandable card layout. By default, show high-level week progress. Expanding a week reveals the detailed task list, editable fields, comments, and due dates.
The Login page should feature a split layout: clean, minimalist login form on one side, and the provided 'login_hero_bg' red abstract image on the other side with an overlay.
Install and configure the necessary fonts from Google Fonts in the CSS/HTML entry points.
